free_text: Thermal neutron cross sections and (n,gamma) resonance
Cadmium ratio method used to determine thermal cross
sections and resonance integrals of elements measured.
Target materials were placed between foils of gold
and manganese alloys for irradiation. The activities
of the Au and Mn products were used to determine the
Values taken from Chart of Nuclides (1972).
No information on source of uncertainties.
